final:
module RefModule(input I, output O);// Declare output enable signal
    wire oe = 1'b1; // Set output enable to 1

    // Replace the unknown module with a simple buffer implementation
    assign O = ((oe) && (I)) || (!(oe) && (1'bz)); // Output I when oe is high, otherwise high-impedance (tri-state)
endmodule
